_comment: Copy to config.json and edit. Non-secret run params only; secrets go in .env.

targets._note: work_authorization + salary_floor are advisory: they add a heads-up reason on a match, they do not change the score.

sources._note: Greenhouse/Lever take company slugs (boards.greenhouse.io/<slug>). Workday takes a careers URL (…myworkdayjobs.com/…).
